text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I can't believe it's already the last day of summer
camp. Feels like it went by in a flash.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (But... I definitely did improve.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't come crying to me if people scoff at you
when you ask them to train with a pipsqueak.
No one would do that.
No one would do that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, huh? I guess I should give it a
shot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who's that in front of the screen?

text_block_list.name: Screen
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is in the lead with fifty meters left!
She's holding it... and finishes first!

text_block_list.name: Screen
text_block_list.text:
That was nine lengths between first and second
place! Narita Brian debuts with a glorious win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Brian's debuted already?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Taishin. Yes, she'll be in her junior year
starting this year.

Narita Brian is an Umamusume with devastating
physical prowess—hailed as "the Beast"—and is
also Biwa Hayahide's younger sister.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you're not watching this footage
over and over again just because you're proud of
your sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... How nice it would be if our relationship
were that simple.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The Beast has been loosed from her cage now. I'm
sure she'll sweep through all her races and sprint
toward a glorious level of fame.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I dare even say that it won't be long until she
sinks her teeth into me as well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: However, I will not let her tear me apart.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: My winning equation will be completed soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (The heck is up with that...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (It's not something you get just by training!)

Summer camp comes to a conclusion, and the
Kikuka Sho draws near, bringing with it
premonitions of trouble.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I keep coughing lately...
